chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 334 of 2026 Date of hearing Order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.1201/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.1202/2026 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 5. For orders on CMA No.1203/2026 (S/A) 20.02.2026 Mr. Deedar Ali M. Chohan, Advocate along with Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< 1. Urgency granted. 3. Granted, subject to all just legal exceptions. 2,4&5. Learned counsel for the petitioner does not press the instant Constitutional Petition on the ground that he intends to approach the concerned Court. However, he submits that the Investigating Officer be directed to investigate fairly and impartially. It is the obligation of the Investigating Officer to conduct the investigation fairly and impartially. However, so far as the transfer of investigation is concerned, the same falls within the domain of the learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace. Since learned counsel does not press the petition, the same stands disposed of as not pressed, along with the listed applications. JUDGE JUDGE ARBROHI/PS
